---
name: "Feature request"
about: "Propose an idea / Proponi un'idea"
title: ""
labels: "enhancement"
---

## 🇬🇧 English

**Problem / motivation**
What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

**Proposed solution**
How would you like it to work?

**Alternatives**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Scope / notes**
Anything else relevant (edge cases, related issues, out-of-scope items).

---

## 🇮🇹 Italiano

**Problema / motivazione**
Che problema risolve? Perché serve?

**Soluzione proposta**
Come vorresti che funzionasse?

**Alternative**
Eventuali soluzioni alternative o workaround già considerati.

**Ambito / note**
Altro di rilevante (casi limite, issue collegate, cosa è fuori ambito).
